narrative: Enhanced the LangGraph demo with a typed state annotation and added a small test suite. Documentation now covers typed transitions and how to run tests, demonstrating continued progress toward a richer Claude fork.
user_input: Keep going, I want to be impressed
scene_before: Example graph lacked typed state and no tests existed.
scene_after: Graph uses an annotated state and `npm test` validates the scaffold script, giving a foundation for future CI integration.
